movie.actors: Michael Jordan, Wayne Knight, Theresa Randle, Manner Washington
movie.genre: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Sport
movie.plot: In a desperate attempt to win a basketball match and earn their freedom, the Looney Tunes seek the aid of retired basketball champion, Michael Jordan.
movie.title: Space Jam
movie.writer: Leo Benvenuti, Steve Rudnick, Timothy Harris, Herschel Weingrod
